instruction: The red horizontal strikethrough should not be dark gray. Restore its proper color on the bar chart icon.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/bar-chart.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><line x1="12" y1="20" x2="12" y2="10"/><line x1="18" y1="20" x2="18" y2="4"/><line x1="6" y1="20" x2="6" y2="16"/></g>
  <line id="overstrike" stroke="#444444" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="64" x2="112" y2="64" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/bar-chart.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><line x1="12" y1="20" x2="12" y2="10"/><line x1="18" y1="20" x2="18" y2="4"/><line x1="6" y1="20" x2="6" y2="16"/></g>
  <line id="overstrike" stroke="#e63946" stroke-width="2" x1="16" y1="64" x2="112" y2="64" />
</svg>
